title: BoingBoingItems
description: Makes dropped items bounce like slime when they hit the ground!
body:
# BoingBoing Items

**Makes dropped items bounce like slime when they hit the ground!**

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_da4fb266-565f-4c35-8168-4d7653cb266b.png)

## Features

⇨ **Realistic Bouncing Physics** - Items bounce off surfaces with configurable velocity and height

⇨ **Slime Sound Effects** - Satisfying "squish" sounds when items land

⇨ **Block Particles** - Particles spawn based on the block the item lands on

⇨ **Fully Configurable** - Adjust bounce factor, sound volume, particle count, and more

## Preview

**Dropping Items - Bounce Effect**

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_3b8023e9-032a-405f-a207-2697624ae558.gif)

## Configuration Options

⇨ **Bounce Factor (default: 0.85)**

⇨ **Minimum Bounce Velocity**

⇨ **Horizontal Momentum Conservation**

⇨ **Enable/Disable Sounds**

⇨ **Enable/Disable Particles**

⇨ **Particle Count**

⇨ **Sound Volume**

## Versions

| Loader   |Minecraft Version |Java |
| -------- |----------------- |---- |
| Forge    |1.20.1            |17   |
| NeoForge |1.21.1            |21   |
